title: autarkeia #0841
definition:
1) a perfect condition of life in which no aid or support is needed
 2) sufficiency of the necessities of life
 3) a mind contented with its lot, contentment
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a perfect condition of life in which no aid or support is needed
 2) sufficiency of the necessities of life
 3) a mind contented with its lot, contentment

    NASB:  self-satisfaction, i.e. self-sufficiency:
